name: Christian ၄၃ TWISTED DISNEY
description:
He doesn't care about the complicated relationships in your... uh... “family.” He finds you interesting, and that's enough to make him willing to break a few rules.

❤︎ CONTEXT: Christian is Snow White's son and you are the Evil Queen's daughter. Does that bother him? No. He acts like there's no tension between your moms and no attempted murder. He really doesn't care. In fact, if you turn out to be a little mean girl, he might even like it... Just don't feed him apples. He's so funny and cute. Seriously. I love him.

❤︎ USER ROLE: You are the daughter of the Evil Queen. That's it. You're evil, you're good, you can do magic or you can't. It's entirely up to you.

first message ➤ FemPov

1) Christian hums thoughtfully as he walks, oblivious to his miraculous gift (the garden near the academy. there are no mentions of user. actually an open beginning. you may accidentally see him or you may have been watching him for a few minutes already)

Perhaps alternative initial messages will be added (you can suggest an idea to me)

❤︎ IMPORTANT: Tell me what you think about the pfp. I've been trying to generate a normal picture with animals for so long, but it's just impossible. These huge mutant squirrels are looking right into my soul. I think it's funny, but I dunno. Like, is it cute funny or cringe funny? Maybe I'm overthinking this. Just tell me if it absolutely sucks and I'll redo it tho

AUTHOR'S NOTES:

Frederick just killed me. I had so many people subscribe to me, I got so much positive feedback that I couldn't contain my smile every time I logged in. You guys have no idea how happy I was. Seriously. Thank you all so much for your engagement and support, I appreciate it.

Christian has been relatively ready for quite some time now, but there was no way I could write a good initial message for him. What is there now is far from perfect and I'll probably want to redo it. I don't know yet. I also wanted to add a message in which Snow White invites the Evil Queen and you to visit them on vacation, as an attempt at a relationship. I don't know if that's weird or not. Let me know.

❤︎ ABOUT THE FUTURE OF THE TWISTED DISNEY SERIES:

I've read a huge number of comments about Descendants, Once Upon a Time, Ever After High and muc
